createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the deduction type.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the deduction type.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the deduction type.

code.title: Code
code.description: A code that may be used to identify the deduction type.

category.title: Category
category.description: The category of deduction associated with the deduction type (e.g. dental plans, garnishments, education plans, etc.).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Category.

costCalculationMethod.title: Cost Calculation Method
costCalculationMethod.description: The cost calculation method associated with the deduction type (e.g. percentage, fixed amount, etc.).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Cost Calculation Method.

parentType.title: Parent Type
parentType.description: The deduction type that is one level higher in deduction hierarchy.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Parent Type.

withholdingFrequency.title: Withholding Frequency
withholdingFrequency.description: The withholding frequency associated with the deduction type.

cyclesPerYear.title: Cycles Per Year
cyclesPerYear.description: The number of cycles per year.

payrollPeriods.title: Payroll Periods
payrollPeriods.description: The payroll periods in which the deduction type can be withheld.

taxApplication.title: Tax Application
taxApplication.description: An indicator if the deduction should be applied before or after taxes are withheld.
